title: Origin Furs
description: A Origins extension mod which adds visuals for each origin, that modifies and adds onto the player model.
body:
## A Origins mod extension that adds models and visuals to the Player.

Note from Developer:
Due to mental stress related issues, development, fixes, and updates may be slow. I do plan to continue work on ORIF.

All models are custom-made using AzureLib (Or GeckoLib), and support overlaying skins, fullbright textures, and custom model parts & animations.

If using on a server, make sure this mod is on the server as well! 
Otherwise rendering may not work properly

### Supported mods:

- [(+) Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)
- [(+) Extra Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-origins)
- [(&) Mob Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/moborigins)
- [(?) Ventur Origin](https://modrinth.com/mod/venturorigin)
- [(?) Origins++](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-plus-plus)
- [(?) TooManyOrigins](https://modrinth.com/mod/toomanyorigins)
- [(?) Origins Minus](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-minus)
- [(?) Grounded Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/grounded-origins)
- [(?) Aspects](https://modrinth.com/mod/aspects)
- [(?) Wolfkin Origin](https://modrinth.com/mod/wolfkin-origin)
- [(?) Slime Origin Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/slimeorigin)
- [(?) Entropy's Chosen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/entropys-chosen)
- [(?) Horrorgins](https://modrinth.com/mod/horrorgins)
- [(?) Lankaster's Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/lankasters-origins)
- [(?) Wiidude's Custom Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/wiidudes-custom-origins)
- [(?) Unethly Origin](https://modrinth.com/mod/unethly-origin)
- [(?) Mythical Origins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mythical-origins)
- *\* : not fully implemented*

- *\- : not supported*

- *\+ : fully supported*
- *\& : partially implemented as of current version*
- *\% : in progress*
- *\? : planned*



## CURRENT INCOMPATIBILITIES:


The rendering backend for this mod is entirely custom, and efficient. It's much more minimal than [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura?hl=en-US) as it only has things that effect the player's model.

This backend will be turned into a library soon, and become a dependency as well
